name: APM: Community and Economic Development, Financial Opportunity Center, NAC & SCI
description_short: APM: Community and Economic Development, Financial Opportunity Center, NAC & SCI is a credit repair provider based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Rated 4.7/5 with 12 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
APM: Community and Economic Development, Financial Opportunity Center, NAC & SCI is a credit repair provider serving clients in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Carrying a 4.7/5.0 Google rating from 12 reviews, APM: Community and Economic Development, Financial Opportunity Center, NAC & SCI has an excellent reputation among consumers in the Philadelphia area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

APM: Community and Economic Development, Financial Opportunity Center, NAC & SCI specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Philadelphia, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. APM: Community and Economic Development, Financial Opportunity Center, NAC & SCI operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Philadelphia, Pennsylvania area who are considering APM: Community and Economic Development, Financial Opportunity Center, NAC & SCI should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
